title: Consistent Image Grid
description: Create a responsive image grid where all images are displayed consistently using object-fit: cover, regardless of their original aspect ratios.
hint: Set fixed container dimensions and use object-fit: cover on the images.

title: Product Gallery with Contain
description: Build a product image gallery where all product photos are fully visible using object-fit: contain, with a subtle background color for letterboxing.
hint: Use object-fit: contain on product images and set a background color on the container.

title: Portrait Photo Grid
description: Create a portrait photography grid where images use object-fit: cover and object-position: top to keep faces visible even in cropped views.
hint: Set object-position: top on portrait images to keep the face/head in frame.

title: Video Background Hero
description: Build a hero section with a video background that uses object-fit: cover to fill the viewport while maintaining aspect ratio.
hint: Apply object-fit: cover to the video element, with width and height at 100% of the container.
